payload.author: claude
payload.body: Delivered: trust-lsp surfaces advisory bug_rules on non-strict (plain Rust) files, R0042 excluded. FOLLOW-UP: (1) honor trust.toml rules/allow/warn in the LSP (needs TrustConfig lifted out of the trust binary into a shared crate so CLI + LSP share it); (2) editor-setup docs beyond the Neovim snippet (VS Code ext packaging is RT-59); (3) consider mapping advisory findings to Warning severity in-editor so a not-yet-adopted project isn't all-red.
